This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: SA Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: SA Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Pricing & Valuation: To be determined by independent KSA valuer approved under CMA rules; no guidance or pricing discussed outside permitted information-barrier channels

Positive MNPI (conditional): Condition precedent includes Issuer’s notification to CMA of an internal audit finding that certain previously reported Scope 2 ESG metrics require downward restatement, with public clarification to follow after CMA guidance

Commercial Terms (non-binding): Non-binding summary of vendor volume rebates and warranty extensions for green equipment is attached for discussion only and does not affect reported revenue or guidance

Cross-Border Transfer: No cross-border transfer of personal data is anticipated; if later required, Issuer will apply for SDAIA permit and implement localization controls before any transfer occurs

Draft Non-Binding Term Sheet — Strategic Minority Investment in Al‑Waha Climate Systems CJSC (Kingdom of Saudi Arabia)
Parties: Investor — Nimr Crescent Investments LLC (CR: 701-XX-XXXX); Issuer — Al‑Waha Climate Systems CJSC (CR: 101-XX-XXXX), Riyadh, KSA
Instrument: Shari’ah-compliant convertible sukuk or alternative murabaha-based instrument, subject to Shari’ah board approval; no public offer under CMA regulations
Pricing & Valuation: To be determined by independent KSA valuer approved under CMA rules; no guidance or pricing discussed outside permitted information-barrier channels
Use of Proceeds: ESG/climate retrofits for manufacturing lines, energy-efficiency upgrades, and non-marketing pilot of water-cooling optimization in accordance with publicly available sustainability roadmap
Crypto & Digital Assets (benign use): Internal “SahaWallet-Demo” crypto wallet sandbox used solely for staff training and tabletop settlement simulations; no token issuance, exchange listing, or customer on-boarding contemplated
Cyber & Resilience (benign use): Annual cyber incident tabletop exercise scheduled with external assessor; no actual breach disclosure is being made in this term sheet, and the scenario plans are for operations training only
Saudi PDPL & PII: Personal data (including National ID/Iqama labels on forms) will not be collected for this transaction except minimal KYC by regulated third parties; any indirect identifiers will be masked or pseudonymized per KSA PDPL
Cross-Border Transfer: No cross-border transfer of personal data is anticipated; if later required, Issuer will apply for SDAIA permit and implement localization controls before any transfer occurs
Insider Governance (benign use): Draft insider-list template and blackout/tipping awareness materials may be shared for policy benchmarking; production insider lists will not include personal numbers and are maintained via compliance@alwahacs.example
Listing & Disclosure: Issuer has publicly announced a feasibility study for a potential future Tadawul Growth Market application; this term sheet does not constitute a prospectus or commitment and will not be posted on any exchange
Positive MNPI (conditional): Condition precedent includes Issuer’s notification to CMA of an internal audit finding that certain previously reported Scope 2 ESG metrics require downward restatement, with public clarification to follow after CMA guidance
Commercial Terms (non-binding): Non-binding summary of vendor volume rebates and warranty extensions for green equipment is attached for discussion only and does not affect reported revenue or guidance
Regulatory Approvals: Closing is subject to CMA approvals (if applicable), Shari’ah certification, and any sectoral NCA cyber compliance confirmations for IT control changes, none of which are being relied upon for trading decisions
